angles.argument: Standardized tests like IQ tests show persistent racial gaps that haven't closed despite equal opportunities, proving inherent differences
Countries with high PISA test scores like Singapore and Finland have strict discipline and rote learning, not 'progressive' methods
College admissions tests like SAT predict college success better than high school GPA alone, so test-optional policies lower standards
Drug testing in sports catches cheaters, but schools avoid testing students for fairness, leading to uneven playing fields
COVID test positivity rates spiked with more testing, showing tests create false pandemics through overdiagnosis
Animal testing has led to vaccines and treatments that save human lives, so banning it would halt medical progress
